  "findings": [
    "Missing hanger nails in multiple empty holes of installed joist hangers."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved Simpson Strong-Tie connector nails or structural screws in all empty hanger holes before closing out the framing."
  ],
  "rationale": "Simpson Strong-Tie and IRC guidelines require all face and joist holes in hangers to be filled with specified fasteners to achieve the rated load capacity. Missing fasteners compromise the structural integrity of the connection.",

    "IRC Section R502.9",

  ]
